title: Brazilian Pasta Flamed Shrimp
description: A spicy and flavorful pasta dish with flamed shrimp, great for a quick dinner. The farfalle pasta pairs well with the bold flavors of the Brazilian spices.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the farfalle pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the flamed shrimp and cook until pink and cooked through, about 2 minutes per side.
Add the Brazilian spice blend to the skillet and stir to combine. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the reserved pasta water to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked farfalle pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the shrimp and sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
